entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea) used in the study to assess genotype performance.

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme activity measured at different growth stages to predict relative performance.

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The mass of root nodules measured at different growth stages to predict relative performance.

entities.name: RELATIVE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: A measure of genotype quality based on a large number of characters spanning the entire growth phase.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location where twenty-one groundnut genotypes were studied.

entities.name: DELHI
entities.description: A location where seventeen groundnut genotypes were studied.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Spanish, Valencia, and Virginia groups of groundnut genotypes.

entities.name: 30 DAYS AFTER FLOWERING
entities.description: The specific growth stage at which nitrogenase activity and nodule mass closely matched relative performance.
